title: 8 Herbal Creams for College Students with Cold Sore
description: Calendula officinalis creams have been used for centuries to help with cold sore symptoms, and for good reason. The cream's active compounds, such as triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and carotenoids, have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help soothe and protect the affected area. When applied topically, these compounds can reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with cold sores. To get the most out of Calendula officinalis creams, apply a small amount to the ...
